article_title: Mass General Team's INSTALL Platform Solves Gene Therapy's Immune Toxicity Problem, Enabling Safe Non-Viral DNA Insertion in Living Mice

content_preview.title: Mass General Team's INSTALL Platform Solves Gene Therapy's Immune Toxicity Problem, Enabling Safe Non-Viral DNA Insertion in Living Mice
content_preview.summary: A Nature paper describes INSTALL, a gene editing platform using circular single-stranded DNA to insert therapeutic genes without triggering fatal immune responses, keeping mice healthy at doses where conventional DNA proved lethal.
content_preview.body_excerpt: Gene therapies that permanently correct inherited diseases require inserting large stretches of DNA into a patient's genome. The dominant approach uses viral vectors — engineered viruses that carry therapeutic genes into cells — but viral delivery is expensive to manufacture, difficult to redose, and limited in the size of genetic cargo it can carry. The alternative, delivering naked double-stranded DNA (dsDNA) via lipid nanoparticles, has been stymied by a biological barrier: mammalian cells tr...

editor_notes.content_quality: Outstanding science journalism. Complex gene therapy research explained clearly with appropriate technical depth. Well-structured progression from problem to solution to limitations.
editor_notes.source_verification: Nature article behind paywall (303 redirect) but confirmed accessible by automated checks. PR Newswire confirms Full Circles Therapeutics, C4DNA platform, Howard Wu CEO and quote, Cambridge MA, CF/beta-thalassemia targets, Kleinstiver/Tou partnership, Nature publication. PubMed listing confirms paper existence.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Key claims verified through PR Newswire: circular ssDNA technology, immune evasion, Kleinstiver/Tou at MGH, mutation-agnostic approach. Specific experimental details (mouse lethality, 1% integration, 4x T cell efficiency, ABCD1 gene) are attributed to the Nature paper but couldn't be independently verified due to paywall.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and appropriately cautious. Limitations section is particularly well-handled.
editor_notes.originality: No existing article on INSTALL platform in the archive.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Exceptional biotech reporting on a significant Nature publication. One of the strongest submissions in this batch. Approved.
